3232650.name: The Funskin Project
3232650.description:
STORY

Now that a snowstorm has devastated the region, the only way to continue your journey is through the castle of the mysterious Baron Fetuccini.
Arriving at the castle, you discover a nightmare from which it seems impossible to escape.

GAMEPLAY FEATURES

Explore varied labyrinthine environments in a non-linear way, solve puzzles and riddles, and carefully manage your resources in this survival horror game where the slightest encounter can be fatal.

Time is also a precious resource. Be careful, when night falls, you could find yourself facing the most dangerous threats.

SOLVE THE MYSTERIES OF THE CASTLE

Meet other characters who are also trapped in the castle. Assisting them may help you unlock the secrets behind the mysterious Funskin project.
